FileSettings.UploadPath: Thu muc goc luu file video sau khi tai hoac convert.
FileSettings.FfmpegPath: Duong dan toi file ffmpeg.exe dung de convert video.

CameraSettings.Username: Tai khoan dang nhap mac dinh de ket noi camera hoac NVR.
CameraSettings.Password: Mat khau dang nhap mac dinh de ket noi camera hoac NVR.
CameraSettings.DefaultSdkPort: Cong SDK mac dinh duoc dung khi camera trong DB chua co SDKPort rieng.
CameraSettings.RtspPort: Cong RTSP dung de tao luong xem live.

HikVision.ScanTimeoutMs: Tong thoi gian toi da de quet thiet bi Hikvision trong mang.
HikVision.QuietPeriodMs: Neu het thiet bi moi trong khoang nay thi ket thuc scan som.
HikVision.SdkConnectTimeoutMs: Thoi gian cho moi lan SDK ket noi toi thiet bi.
HikVision.SdkConnectRetryCount: So lan SDK thu ket noi trong mot lan goi login.
HikVision.LoginRetryCount: So lan thu dang nhap lai camera khi login that bai.
HikVision.LoginRetryDelayMs: Khoang nghi giua cac lan dang nhap lai.
HikVision.DownloadRetryCount: So lan thu tai lai video khi file rong hoac SDK tra ve loi.
HikVision.DownloadRetryBaseDelaySeconds: So giay co ban de cho truoc moi lan retry download.
HikVision.DownloadProgressPollIntervalMs: Chu ky doc tien do download tu SDK.
HikVision.DownloadTimeoutAttempts: So lan poll toi da truoc khi coi la download timeout.
HikVision.DownloadFileReadyTimeoutSeconds: Thoi gian cho file duoc flush ra disk sau khi SDK bao 100%.
HikVision.DownloadFileReadyPollIntervalMs: Chu ky kiem tra file da xuat hien va co du lieu hay chua.
HikVision.MinimumDownloadedFileBytes: Kich thuoc file toi thieu de xem la download hop le.
HikVision.RetryWindowPaddingSeconds: So giay mo rong them o dau/cuoi khoang thoi gian moi lan retry.
HikVision.MinimumClipDurationSeconds: Do dai clip toi thieu de bat dau tai.
HikVision.MaximumClipDurationMinutes: Do dai clip toi da de tranh tai qua lau va de bi timeout.
HikVision.RecordingReadyDelaySeconds: So giay cho them sau khi ket thuc don de camera/NVR kip tao recording index.
HikVision.FfmpegTimeoutMinutes: Thoi gian toi da cho mot lan convert FFmpeg.
HikVision.SdkLogPath: Thu muc luu log native cua HikVision SDK.
